title: Shola Aur Shabnam
subTitle: Divya loves Karan and plans to get married to him. However, a notorious gangster's brother, Bali, who also has his eyes on her, goes to great lengths to destroy her relationship with Karan.

title: Chandni Bar
subTitle: Mumtaz is forced to move to Mumbai when her parents are killed in a communal riot. Soon, she takes up the job of a dancer in a bar and marries a criminal to safeguard her future.

title: C.I.D. 909
subTitle: Professor, an Indian scientist, develops a nuclear project to bring world peace.

title: Ab Tak Chhappan 2
subTitle: Sadhu Agashe, a retired encounter specialist, faces a series of challenges after he returns to Mumbai to solve various criminal cases growing in the city.

title: Kartavya
subTitle: Vijay, a forest officer, takes up the task to nab poachers. As he strives to catch the criminals, a vast network of illegal activities is uncovered.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Meherbaan
subTitle: Ravi promises his father on his deathbed that he will take care of Chaurangilal's family whenever the need arises. However, a cunning Chaurangilal, concocts a plan to leave Ravi bankrupt and take over his wealth.

title: Jeevan Ek Sanghursh
subTitle: Karan, a good-hearted thief, is compelled to work for a criminal mastermind. However, things take a turn when he reunites with his estranged family and tries to leave the underworld.

title: Maidan-E-Jung
subTitle: Data Guru, a powerful man, spreads terror in his village. Later, when a villager marries his widowed daughter-in-law, he sets out to seek revenge.

title: Dil Hai Betaab
subTitle: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry. However, when her father's employer asks for Meena's hand in marriage, he accepts his proposal and ruins his daughter's life.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Saajan Chale Sasural
subTitle: After Shyamsunder presumes that his first wife Pooja died in a flood, he marries Divya. When he learns that Pooja is alive, he has to juggle between his wives, keeping both his marriages a secret.

title: Dil Tera Aashiq
subTitle: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

title: Gunehgaar
subTitle: Starcast Rishi Kapoor, Rajendra Kumar Director Rahul Rawail Genre Drama Producer Rahul Rawail Banner Music Director Rahul Dev Burman Original Year of Release 1981 Hindi Dubbed Year of Release Synopsis Police Inspector Madan Singh can sacrifie anything for his duty. He is in love with Sushma. Arun her brother is a violent leader of mill workers. Madan marries Sushma. One day Arun tries to kill the mill owner. Madan shoots Arun. An angry Sushma walks out of his life.

title: Comedy Station
subTitle: Various talented comedians perform hilarious skits and stand-up acts on diverse themes and topics to entertain the audience.

title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.

title: Do Aur Do Paanch
subTitle: Two rival thieves, Sunil and Vijay, must kidnap a wealthy man's son in order to demand a ransom from his father, but things take a turn when some events cause them to change their mind.

title: Man Ki Aankhen
subTitle: Rajesh is in love with his teacher's daughter and marries her in secret as he fears the wrath of his dowry-seeking mother. He hopes his mother will accept his new wife.

title: Shaan
subTitle: After their cop brother dies at the hands of a ruthless gangster, Vijay and Ravi are determined to find the gangster and take their revenge.

title: Ramkali
subTitle: Inspector Sultan becomes a fugitive and bandit, driven by a quest for vengeance. Later, he crosses paths with a dancer, Ramkali, and discovers that she is also seeking retribution.

title: Haath Ki Safai
subTitle: Brothers Raju and Shankar, who are separated by fate, cross paths with each other in Mumbai when Kamini, a wealthy runaway, unintentionally barges into their lives.

title: Chacha Bhatija
subTitle: Teja, a widower, marries Sonia, a girl who only wants to get her hands on his inheritance. So, she creates animosity between Teja, his brother and his son.

title: Disco Dancer
subTitle: A slum-dwelling performer finds a new calling as a rising disco star. However, things take an unfortunate turn when an enemy from the past reappears in his life.

title: Disco Dancer
subTitle: A slum-dwelling performer finds a new calling as a rising disco star. However, things take an unfortunate turn when an enemy from the past reappears in his life.

title: Namak Haraam
subTitle: Two young men from very different backgrounds, one from a shanty house in a Delhi slum, the other from a very wealthy Calcutta family, forge a friendship which is then put to the ultimate test.

title: Garam Coat
subTitle: When Girdharilal loses his monthly wages, his wife assures him that she will somehow manage. Soon, a well-stocked pantry makes him suspect his wife's intentions. He takes a drastic step.

title: Sukhee
subTitle: Dissatisfied with her mundane life, a homemaker decides to travel to Delhi to attend her high school reunion. The trip soon turns out to be a sweet blessing that helps her find her identity.

title: Jurm
subTitle: SHEKHAR IS A POLICE OFFICER IN THE BOMBAY POLICE FORCE. HE IS A HONEST AND DEDICATED MAN MARRIED TO MEENA FROM HER A DAUGHTER BABLI- THEY MAKE AN ENVIABLE FAMILY. KADAM, HIS JUNIOR OFFICER IS THE ONLY REAL FRIEND HE HAS. ALL IS WELL WITH SHEKHAR AND THEN SUDDENLY ONE DAY HIS LIFE BEGINS TO FALL APRT. EDITOR RITESH NANDY IS KILLED.

title: Pyar Ke Naam Qurbaan
subTitle: Billu attempts to play Holi with Devika, but she gets him arrested. In an attempt to take revenge, he kidnaps her, which infuriates her brother, who sets out to save her.

title: Waqt Ki Awaz
subTitle: A rich girl runs away from home and settles down with a truck driver. However, her dream life is shattered when she learns that her new lover has been accused of murder.

title: Gair
subTitle: Vijay falls for Madhu and wishes to marry her. However, things take a turn when Raja, Vijay's step-brother, attempts to destroy their relationship.

title: Izzat Ki Roti
subTitle: Laxmi lives happily with her sons Krishna and Jeet. However, jealous Veerendra Pratap tries to steal her business by turning the brothers against each other.

title: Aatish Feel the Fire
subTitle: To support his younger brother, Avinash, Baba joins the world of crime. However, their worlds turn upside down when Avinash becomes a police officer and is ordered to arrest Baba.

title: Naajayaz
subTitle: Jai and Sandhya pursue gangster Raj Solanki, but the case takes a shocking twist when Jai discovers Raj is his long-lost father.
